items.claim: Magomed Tulov has seven amateur fights.
items.quote: do find a little bit of comfort in his seven amateur fights.

items.claim: Magomed Tulov has not fought a fighter currently active in the UFC.
items.quote: he hasn't fought a guy that's actively in the UFC. This is his debut.

items.claim: Magomed Tulov might have a glass chin because he is skinny around the neck.
items.quote: if Tulov's got a little bit of a glass chin, he is a little skinny with that neck.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim is a substantially worse fighter than his brother Gabriel Bonfim.
items.quote: Ismile Bonef is the substantially worse Bonefin brother.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim has good kickboxing, body work, wide hooks, and solid leg kicks.
items.quote: Is Bonfim is a decent striker. His kickboxing is pretty good. His body work is nice. He's got offensive skills. He rips those wide hooks. He's got pretty solid leg kicks.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim tends to wilt and break when hit hard.
items.quote: hit him hard, he's going to will. He breaks. We've seen it time and time and time again.

items.claim: Axel Sola has a height and reach advantage over Ismael Bonfim at 6 feet tall with a 74-inch reach.
items.quote: Good karate-esque kickboxing. He's got a nice height and reach advantage here. 6' tall versus 5'8. 74 inch reach 71 and a half.
